infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NearPast uses your location to unlock nearby place stories.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NearPast uses your camera so you can take selfie photos for place challenges.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NearPast may use your microphone while capturing challenge media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NearPast lets you pick a photo for place challenges.
